text.title: choreography-vs-orchestration-decision Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the choreography-vs-orchestration-decision methodology end-to-end.

step.name: map-owner-services
step.action: Identify owner team per event emitter/consumer.

step.name: apply-ownership-heuristic
step.action: If ownership is concentrated and steps > 5, orchestration; else choreography per r5.
step.decision-gate: If naturally distributed AND <= 5 steps, choreography is acceptable.

step.name: draft-trade-offs-and-rationale
step.action: Write decision + trade-off table + rationale citing inputs.
